# Documentation

- [About HELIX](/docs): A declarative, theme-aware UI widget framework for Unity UI Toolkit.

- **Start**
- [Getting Started](/docs/getting-started): Install HELIX Widgets, mount your first widget tree, and learn the essential building blocks.

- **Core Concepts**
- [Widget Catalog](/docs/widgets): Every built-in widget in HELIX Widgets, organized by job, with usage guidance and code examples.
- [Widget Previews](/docs/previews): Every built-in widget in HELIX Widgets, organized by job, with usage guidance and code examples.
- [State & Reconciliation](/docs/state-and-reconciliation): How HELIX rebuilds widget trees while preserving mounted elements and local state.

- **Styling**
- [Theming & Modifiers](/docs/theming-and-modifiers): Apply primitive theme tokens, substance layers, and composable modifier helpers to style HELIX widgets.

- **Interaction**
- [Navigation, Scrolling & Prompts](/docs/navigation-scrolling-prompts): Page stacks with transitions, scroll controllers, virtualized lists, pan views, and input prompt glyphs.

- **Development**
- [Components](/docs/test): Components
-
